title: phegopteris hosei
intro: Phegopteris hosei, also known as Hose's fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phegopteris hosei include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Phegopteris hosei typically involve making a decoction by boiling the plant's leaves or using it in a tea form to harness its medicinal properties.
